themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Origen of Alexandria on HOMILIES ON LEVITICUS 9.5.7-8: After these, in the seventh month othe...". Cross references echo "Holy".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וְחַגֹּתֶ֥ם: and ye shall keep - properly, to move in a circle, i.e., (specifically) to march...".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וּלְשַׁלְמֵיכֶֽם׃: and for your peace offerings - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sac...".
